title: _source_ledger.json -- per-file intake review ledger v0.1
description: Per-file classification (raw vs. ground_truth) and human review status for a case's intake. See harness-guardrails-dev D2. Every file starts pending; intake will not copy any file while any entry is pending, and a single rejected entry blocks the whole case's intake. This is a shared state file, not a component output -- it does not use the common output envelope. Written/read only through the DAO (read_ledger / set_ledger_status).

source_dir.description: The source-cases/ folder this case was intake'd from.

classification.description: Proposed by filename-pattern matching at intake.

review_status.description: Starts pending for every file. Only a human sets approved/rejected -- see D2.

rejection_reason.description: Required when review_status is rejected -- why the proposed classification looks wrong.
